article_title: Spotify Extends AI-Powered Prompted Playlists to Podcasts, Letting Premium Users Build Episode Lineups from Natural Language Prompts

content_preview.title: Spotify Extends AI-Powered Prompted Playlists to Podcasts, Letting Premium Users Build Episode Lineups from Natural Language Prompts
content_preview.summary: Spotify's AI playlist tool now generates personalized podcast episode collections from text prompts, rolling out in beta to Premium subscribers across seven English-speaking markets.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Spotify announced on April 7 that its AI-powered Prompted Playlist feature, which debuted for music late last year, now supports podcasts. Premium subscribers in seven English-speaking markets can type a natural-language description of what they want to hear, and the system assembles a curated sequence of podcast episodes drawn from the platform's catalog, as [reported by TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2026/04/07/spotifys-prompted-playlist-feature-will-now-work-for-podcasts-too/...

recommendations: Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured tech news article with clear explanation of the feature, its availability, and thoughtful analysis of competitive implications.
editor_notes.source_verification: All 4 sources fetched and verified. TechCrunch confirms April 7 announcement. Spotify newsroom confirms three signals (prompt, history, trends), Lizzy Hale quote matches verbatim, 34M weekly podcast discovery stat, explanatory notes, daily/weekly refresh. Engadget confirms markets and raises preferential treatment concern. 9to5Mac confirms December 2025 NZ launch, January 2026 US/CA, usage limits, Premium-only.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Minor discrepancy: article says 'seven English-speaking markets' but Engadget and 9to5Mac list 6 (US, CA, UK, IE, NZ, SE). Australia is not confirmed in any fetched source. The 263M Premium subscriber figure is not sourced in the article but is public Spotify earnings data. All other claims verified.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. Appropriately notes concerns about preferential treatment without editorializing.
editor_notes.originality: No prior coverage of Spotify's Prompted Playlist feature in the archive.
concerns: Article claims 7 markets including Australia but sources only confirm 6 — Australia may have been in the full Spotify newsroom post but is not confirmed in the secondary sources
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Solid tech news article with good sourcing from official newsroom and three independent outlets. Minor market count discrepancy does not affect overall quality. Approved.
